chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-382 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on M.A. 15842/2016 3. For orders on M.A. 15843/2016 4. For hearing of main case 08.08.2023 Mr. Sulleman Dahri advocate for petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh. ----- Learned counsel submits that the grievance of the petitioner has been redressed and he has been instructed not to press this petition. Dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE
